title: Gtechniq Bug Remover for Cars. W8 Non-Caustic Cleaner for Bug Stains, 100% Biodegradable. Easy to Use - 500ml
features: POWERFUL CAR CLEANER EFFECTIVELY REMOVES BUG SPLATTER - easily rids your car of stubborn bug stains without needing to scrub and scrape and leaving it sparkling clean and smear free

DOESN'T DAMAGE COATINGS - this cleaner has a non-caustic formula that lubricates dirt particles to minimise surface abrasion, removing hard splatters without damaging the car painted surface - a must have for your car washing kit
EASY TO APPLY Simply spray onto the affected area and rinse off with water after a few minutes to effortlessly lift off dried-on bugs, leaving your surfaces crystal clear and shiny

MADE BY THE WORLD LEADER IN MOLECULAR NANOTECHNOLOGY – founded in 2001 by a quantum physicist, Gtechniq car cleaning products are unique and use innovative, advanced technology to achieve a level of performance that outclasses any other on the market​

100% CUSTOMER SATISFACTION FROM UK BASED GLOBAL COMPANY – sold in 50 countries worldwide, Gtechniq has been the no 1 choice of high-end vehicles for over 20 years, and is passionate about the quality of their products and the stellar service they provide
description: Introducing the Gtechniq W8v2 Bug Remover, a strong, biodegradable agent that removes stubborn bug and insect splatter residue from your vehicle’s paintwork. Gtechniq’s W8v2 Bug Remover provides unbeatable results when it comes to removing dead insects and bugs that have splattered over the front of your vehicle after a long drive. Safe to use on paintwork and other Gtechniq coatings, W8 is a must have product in your garage. Removes Stubborn Residue After long trips your car or vehicle will accumulate a splattering of dead bugs and insects on the grill, bonnet and windscreen. Gtechniq’s W8v2 Bug Remover is up to the job, removing the tough bug residue in no time. A Must Have Maintence Product W8v2 Bug Remover is perfect to use on any surface that has gathered dead bugs and insects after long journeys. It’s a must have product in every garage, and unlike traditiol bug removers, W8v2 doesn’t contain any aggressive caustic ingredients that might damage your paintwork. Works On Any Surface The Gtechniq W8v2 Bug Remover is specifically formulated to provide effective bug removal without damaging coatings, waxes or sealants by Gtechniq. It makes light work of bug residue, quickly and easily. Easy To Use Shake product well before using this product, and do not apply in direct sunlight or without protective gloves. Spray W8v2 onto bug splattered areas and leave to dwell for 3-5 minutes. Rinse and repeat if necessary. In extreme cases, use a MF1 ZeroR Microfibre Buff Cloth agitate the affected area. Store in a cool, dry place Use within 12 months of opening.
